headline: Prudential Financial Expands PGIM Offerings With Private Credit Retirement Trust
summary: PGIM, the asset management division of Prudential Financial (NYSE:PRU), has launched its first private credit collective investment trust for defined contribution retirement plans. The new vehicle is designed to give 401(k) and similar plans access to private credit as an alternative asset class. For Prudential Financial, known for insurance, retirement and asset management services, this move puts more attention on PGIM's role in serving institutional retirement plans.
